ham.subject: Your XYZ SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice – 15 May 2026
ham.body:
Hi Rahul,

Hope you are doing well. This is a friendly reminder that your subscription to XYZ SaaS will automatically renew on 15th May 2026. The renewal amount will be ₹12,500.00.

If you wish to review or modify your plan, simply click the link below:

<URL>

Thank you for choosing XYZ SaaS. If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team.

Best regards,
XYZ SaaS Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Join the Zoom Meeting for Project X – 3:00 PM IST
spam.body:
Dear Team,

You have been invited to a critical Zoom/Teams meeting to discuss Project X. The meeting is scheduled for 3:00 PM IST today, and your presence is mandatory.

Please click on the link below to join the meeting on time:

<URL>

Kindly confirm your attendance by replying to this email before 2:45 PM IST. Delay in joining may cause project delays.

Thanks & Regards,
Project Management Office
